summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM notification system. Backend APIs, frontend UI, customer cabinet, and Telegram integration all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend health check via notifications API (401 unauthorized)
Homepage loads correctly with BIBI Cars branding and VIN search
Admin login page loads with proper form fields
Customer login page loads with Ukrainian interface
Customer cabinet endpoints respond correctly (404 for non-existent customer)
Telegram webhook endpoint working (returns 201 with ok: true)
Customer cabinet notifications page renders with proper navigation
Navigation between cabinet sections working correctly
Telegram integration banner and connect button present
All cabinet menu items accessible (Dashboard, Notifications, Orders, etc.)
No JavaScript errors or console warnings detected
